title: Alexandros Giotopoulos of November 17, Greek Militant Group, Is Freed
summary_full: The release of Alexandros Giotopoulos was denounced by relatives of people killed by November 17, a Greek far-left group that was active between 1975 and 2002.
summary_public: The release of Alexandros Giotopoulos was denounced by relatives of people killed by November 17, a Greek far-left group that was active between 1975 and 2002.
